description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Add 120 units of the cheapest coastal-climate-suitable clay roof tile priced under $3 per tile with a warranty of at least 30 years to your cart.

target_names: Coastal Shield Clay Field Tile - Sand

tasks.instruction: Compare the weight per square metre of the first two concrete roof tiles suitable for at least a 20° roof pitch, then add to your cart exactly the number of tiles recommended by the coverage calculator for a 100 m² roof for the lighter option.

tasks.instruction: From the dark grey roof tiles that are solar-compatible and have at least a 4.0-star customer rating, select the highest-rated series and add 200 field tiles and 20 matching ridge tiles from that series to your cart.

target_names: Urban Slate Flat Concrete - Dark Grey
Urban Slate Ridge Tile - Dark Grey

tasks.instruction: Use the tile sample request feature to pick one roof tile model that offers at least three color options, request samples for three different colors of that same model, and submit the form with the provided contact and shipping details.

tasks.instruction: Find the installation guide PDF for a flat concrete roof tile with a 30-year warranty and save that guide to your on-site resource library.

tasks.instruction: Using the installer locator, find a certified roofing installer within 25 miles of ZIP code 30301 that offers residential service and weekend hours, choose the nearest result, and save them to your saved installers list.
